scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage is accurate (relation.data[event.unit], relation.units, event.app, self.unit/self.app patterns). Missing the Relation.load alternative with dataclasses/pydantic, the filtering pattern `if unit.app is not self.app` when iterating units, and the note that local app databag is writable only on the leader unit.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the note that event.unit can be None if app data changed is a legitimate ops behavior, not a hallucination
